title: Promote community programs
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Promote community programs demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify target markets

pcs.text: Identify potential of program to appeal to sections of community or industry in terms of benefits and costs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential of program to appeal to sections of community or industry in terms of benefits and costs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential of program to appeal to sections of community or industry in terms of benefits and costs.

pcs.text: Identify sectors of community and industry that are potential users, customers and audiences of program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify sectors of community and industry that are potential users, customers and audiences of program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify sectors of community and industry that are potential users, customers and audiences of program.

pcs.text: Develop a plan to promote program or local projects or group activities with other communication activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop a plan to promote program or local projects or group activities with other communication activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop a plan to promote program or local projects or group activities with other communication activities.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify target markets

elements.title: Develop promotional materials

pcs.text: Determine range of promotional channels to reach target sectors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine range of promotional channels to reach target sectors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine range of promotional channels to reach target sectors.

pcs.text: Source or develop promotional materials to suit promotional channels and target sectors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source or develop promotional materials to suit promotional channels and target sectors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source or develop promotional materials to suit promotional channels and target sectors.

pcs.text: Test impact of promotional materials with group or community members
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Test impact of promotional materials with group or community members?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Test impact of promotional materials with group or community members.

pcs.text: Obtain specialist marketing support to address specific marketing issues within promotion budget and program and agency guidelines
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain specialist marketing support to address specific marketing issues within promotion budget and program and agency guidelines?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain specialist marketing support to address specific marketing issues within promotion budget and program and agency guidelines.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Develop promotional materials

elements.title: Promote program to potential users

pcs.text: Approach potential users of program and services through promotional channels and directly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Approach potential users of program and services through promotional channels and directly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Approach potential users of program and services through promotional channels and directly.

pcs.text: Assess impact of promotional activities to determine changes required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess impact of promotional activities to determine changes required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess impact of promotional activities to determine changes required.

pcs.text: Adjust promotional plan and activities to achieve an improved impact
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Adjust promotional plan and activities to achieve an improved impact?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adjust promotional plan and activities to achieve an improved impact.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Promote program to potential users

elements.title: Obtain commitment to use program services

pcs.text: Present proposals for delivery of program services to interested potential users in terms of benefits, costs and other factors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Present proposals for delivery of program services to interested potential users in terms of benefits, costs and other factors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Present proposals for delivery of program services to interested potential users in terms of benefits, costs and other factors.

pcs.text: Address issues raised by potential users to overcome objections
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Address issues raised by potential users to overcome objections?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Address issues raised by potential users to overcome objections.

pcs.text: Obtain commitments to use program services or support program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain commitments to use program services or support program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain commitments to use program services or support program.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Obtain commitment to use program services

elements.title: Respond to enquiries

pcs.text: Address enquiries by members of community, industry and program in terms of good customer service
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Address enquiries by members of community, industry and program in terms of good customer service?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Address enquiries by members of community, industry and program in terms of good customer service.

pcs.text: Keep records of contacts, enquiries and presentations for reporting and follow-up
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Keep records of contacts, enquiries and presentations for reporting and follow-up?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Keep records of contacts, enquiries and presentations for reporting and follow-up.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow up enquiries and presentations to obtain commitment to program services and objectives.
